title: Faulty VDBE code generated for certain third-party virtual tables
key_bug_features: Faulty VDBE code for third-party virtual tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE virtual_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO virtual_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM virtual_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE virtual_table SET value = CAST('3.14' AS REAL) WHERE id = 1;
